title: Symplectic Neural Operators for Learning Infinite Dimensional Hamiltonian Systems
summary: The modeling and simulation of infinite-dimensional Hamiltonian systems are central problems in mathematical physics and engineering, however they pose significant computational and structural challenges for standard data-driven architectures. In this work, we introduce the Symplectic Neural Operator, a neural operator architecture designed to preserve the symplectic structure intrinsic to Hamiltonian PDEs. We provide a theoretical characterization of their symplecticity and establish a rigorous long-term stability result based on the combination of symplectic structure preservation and learning accuracy. Numerical experiments on canonical Hamiltonian PDEs corroborate this theoretical result and show that SNOs exhibit improved energy behavior compared with non-structure-preserving neural operators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的神经网络架构——共轭神经网络算子（SNO），专门用于学习无限维哈密顿系统，该架构保留了哈密顿系统的辛结构，从而保证了长时间的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统的神经网络算子在学习无限维哈密顿系统时，通常只关注近似精度，而忽略了哈密顿系统固有的辛结构，这可能导致长时间行为不稳定。因此，需要一种能够保留辛结构的神经网络算子。
AI.method: 研究人员设计了共轭神经网络算子（SNO），这是一种神经网络算子架构，旨在保留哈密顿PDE固有的辛结构。SNO通过神经网络架构直接学习有限时间的流映射，并结合辛结构保持和学习精度来建立严格的长期稳定性结果。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，SNO在处理典型哈密顿PDE时，相比于不保留辛结构的神经网络算子，表现出更好的能量行为，验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: SNO为从数据中学习无限维哈密顿系统提供了一种新的有效方法，有望在快速代理模拟、逆问题、不确定性量化和科学发现等领域得到应用。该研究强调了辛结构在哈密顿系统学习中的重要性。

title: Breakeven complexity: A new perspective on neural partial differential equation solvers
summary: Neural surrogate solvers of partial differential equations (PDEs) promise dramatic speedups over numerical methods, especially in scenarios requiring many solves. However, current accuracy-based evaluations do not fully consider two central issues: (1) neural solvers incur substantial up-front costs for data generation, training, and tuning; and (2) classical solvers can also generate low-fidelity solutions at a sufficiently low simulation cost. To explicitly account for these realities and fully incorporate end-to-end costs, we propose an evaluation framework centered on breakeven complexity, a metric that counts the forward solves before a learned solver is cost-effective relative to an error-equivalent traditional solver. To evaluate this measure, we apply scaling laws to determine how much training budget to allocate to data generation and discuss how to achieve smooth error-matching in diverse settings. We evaluate the breakeven complexity of multiple neural PDE solvers on three PDEs on 2D periodic domains from APEBench and a novel benchmark of flows past multiple obstacles generated by the GPU-native PyFR code. Among other findings, our results suggest that neural PDE solvers become more effective as problems get harder in terms of cost, dimension, rollout, physics regime (e.g. higher Reynolds number), etc.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的评估框架，基于“盈亏平衡复杂度”（breakeven complexity）来衡量神经网络 PDE 求解器相对于传统求解器的成本效益，考虑了数据生成、训练和推理等端到端成本。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络 PDE 求解器评估主要关注精度，忽略了数据生成、模型训练和传统求解器低保真模拟的成本。在需要重复求解 PDE 的场景下，需要明确何时投资神经网络求解器的训练成本比直接使用传统求解器更划算。
AI.method: 提出了“盈亏平衡复杂度”作为评估指标，该指标衡量神经网络 PDE 求解器需要进行多少次前向求解才能在成本上优于具有相同误差的传统求解器。通过对多个神经网络 PDE 求解器在不同 PDE 和场景下进行实验，评估了其盈亏平衡复杂度。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，随着问题的复杂性增加（例如，成本、维度、展开、物理状态等），神经网络 PDE 求解器变得更有效。研究还探讨了如何分配训练预算以实现平滑的误差匹配。
AI.conclusion: “盈亏平衡复杂度”提供了一种更现实的评估神经网络 PDE 求解器的成本效益的方式，有助于更好地理解其相对于传统求解器的潜力，并为决策提供更准确的依据。

title: Reweighting free energy profiles between universal machine learning interatomic potentials for fast consensus building
summary: Free energy profiles serve as a fundamental bridge between microscopic atomic fluctuations and macroscopic thermodynamic observables. Estimating the free energy profile along a reaction coordinate, referred to as the potential of mean force (PMF), with density functional theory (DFT) accuracy is computationally expensive. Universal machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) drastically reduce this cost, but their accuracy is strongly determined by their training data and hence can be uncertain for a given system. In this work, we present a systematic and scalable framework for reweighting PMFs, initially sampled with a single 'source' MLIP, across a representative suite of target MLIPs. Because traditional direct exponential reweighting fails for large system sizes due to low phase-space overlap between potentials, we deploy robust analytical corrections. Applying this to a complex 601-atom system of Li$^+$ transport in a nanoconfined electrolyte, we demonstrate that a mean energy-gap approximation effectively bypasses statistical collapse, producing a highly stable PMF matching the target PMF. Using this approach, we recover high-fidelity target thermodynamics across multiple DFT reference levels (PBE+D3, PBE-sol, r$^2$SCAN,r$^2$SCAN-D4) at a fraction of the computational cost of full simulations. Furthermore, thermodynamic analysis reveals that the studied MLIPs partition into two distinct clusters driven by their training data. Our reweighting framework successfully recovers target thermodynamic properties--specifically, reaction and activation free energies--even when the phase-space overlap between potentials is critically low. Ultimately, this approach establishes a vital diagnostic protocol to achieve affordable cross-model consensus on materials chemistry properties without redundant, resource-intensive simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的框架，用于在不同通用机器学习原子势 (MLIP) 之间重新加权势能平均力 (PMF)，从而在计算成本较低的情况下获得高保真度的目标热力学性质。
AI.motivation: 传统的密度泛函理论 (DFT) 计算自由能曲线计算成本高昂，而通用 MLIP 降低了计算成本，但不同 MLIP 的准确性取决于训练数据，因此需要一种方法来整合不同 MLIP 的结果。
AI.method: 该框架通过对单个“源”MLIP 初始采样的 PMF 进行重新加权，并使用代表性的目标 MLIP 集合，采用稳健的解析校正来克服传统直接指数重新加权方法在大型系统中的统计崩溃问题，并使用能量间隙近似。
AI.result: 在 601 原子 Li+ 在纳米限域电解质中的传输系统上，该方法成功地恢复了高保真度的目标热力学性质（反应自由能和活化自由能），即使势能空间重叠度很低，并且 MLIP 可分为由其训练数据驱动的两个不同簇。
AI.conclusion: 该重新加权方法为实现材料化学性质的经济高效的跨模型共识提供了一种重要的诊断协议，无需冗余且资源密集型的模拟，为材料化学研究提供了新的途径。

title: Clock-state olfactory search in turbulent flows using Q-learning: The geometry of plume recovery
summary: Finding an odor source in a turbulent flow requires effectively leveraging the history of olfactory observations into a robust navigation strategy. In this work, we use tabular Q-learning to train an olfactory search agent with a minimal memory of past observations: only a running clock since the last whiff. This agent learns an interpretable strategy to recover the plume which combines well-known behaviors observed in insects: surging, casting, and a return downwind. While achieving good performance on data from direct numerical simulations of turbulence, the agent is limited by an inability to adapt its strategy to the local intermittency level; we show that providing more flexibility improves robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Q学习训练了一种具有最小记忆（仅记录自上次气味检测以来的时间）的嗅觉搜索代理，该代理学习了在湍流中恢复气味轨迹的策略，该策略结合了冲刺、搜索和顺风返回等行为。
AI.motivation: 昆虫在湍流中寻找气味源是一个复杂的问题，需要有效利用气味观察历史来制定导航策略。本文旨在研究有限记忆（如时间）如何影响高效湍流导航中的恢复策略。
AI.method: 使用表格Q学习训练嗅觉搜索代理，代理仅使用一个时钟状态来记录自上次气味检测以来的时间。该代理在直接数值模拟的湍流数据上进行训练，以学习恢复气味轨迹的策略。
AI.result: 训练后的代理能够有效地恢复气味轨迹，其行为与昆虫中观察到的冲刺、搜索和顺风返回等行为相似。然而，代理对局部间歇性水平的适应性有限。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明，即使使用简单的时钟状态作为记忆，也可以学习到有效的嗅觉搜索策略。研究结果强调了记忆结构对导航行为的影响，并表明增加代理的灵活性可以提高其鲁棒性。

title: Variational Autoregressive Networks with probability priors
summary: Monte Carlo methods are essential across diverse scientific fields, yet their efficiency is frequently hampered by critical slowing down-a sharp increase in autocorrelation times near phase transitions. Although deep learning approaches, such as neural-network-based samplers, have been proposed to alleviate this issue, they face another serious problem: the difficulty of training the models. This difficulty partially stems from the overly general nature of original machine-learning architectures, which often ignore underlying physical symmetries and force networks to relearn them from scratch. In this paper, we demonstrate that incorporating physical priors into the model significantly enhances performance. Building upon existing strategies that integrate spin-spin interactions, we propose a framework that utilizes a prior probability distribution as a starting point for training. Our results for the Ising model, as well as for the Edwards-Anderson spin glass model, suggest that moving away from `blank slate' models in favor of physics-informed priors reduces the training burden and facilitates the simulation of larger system sizes in discrete spin models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的深度学习方法，通过在变分自回归网络中引入物理先验概率分布，以提高蒙特卡洛模拟的效率，并减少训练负担。
AI.motivation: 传统的蒙特卡洛方法在相变附近存在“临界减速”问题，而基于深度学习的采样方法虽然能缓解此问题，但训练模型困难。作者认为，这是因为原始机器学习架构过于通用，忽略了潜在的物理对称性，需要网络从头学习。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个变分自回归网络，利用先验概率分布作为训练的起点，将物理信息融入模型中。该框架扩展了已有的基于自旋-自旋相互作用的策略，并应用于伊辛模型和爱德华兹-安德森自旋玻璃模型。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与从“空白状态”开始的模型相比，使用物理先验概率分布的模型能够减少训练负担，并更容易模拟更大规模的离散自旋模型。
AI.conclusion: 引入物理先验概率分布是一种有效的策略，可以提高深度学习模型在蒙特卡洛模拟中的性能，并为更大规模系统的模拟提供可能性。
